name: hud_ui_composite_panel_layout_entries
description: HudUiCompositePanel::LayoutEntries updates the composite panel position, invalidates it, computes entry height through HudUiPanel::QueryTextHeight, and positions each entry at baseY plus one line height per entry.
known_limits: Depends on HudUiPanel::QueryTextHeight, which is functionally accepted but still has a small local byte-shape mismatch.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?LayoutEntries@HudUiCompositePanel@@QAEXHH@Z at 0x4bb9f0 still fails: 156 unmasked mismatches, 16 relocation bytes masked, no trailing NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 172 bytes and the VC object symbol is 112 bytes. The drift reflects different virtual-call/control-flow scheduling around the vector loop.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows thiscall with x/y stack arguments, vtable invalidate at slot 0x20, QueryTextHeight, vector count from begin/end, GetY/GetX virtual calls through slots 0x68 and 0x64, then entry SetPos through slot 0x0c for each 0x2c0-byte entry.
The native layout smoke validates panel x/y update, invalidation side effect, and two entry SetPos results with the recovered line-height spacing.
